name: Almond Shortbread Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and sugar.
3. Add the butter, egg yolk, and almond extract to the flour mixture.
4. Beat at low speed until the ingredients are finely combined, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Press the dough evenly onto the bottom of a greased 15x10x1-inch jelly-roll pan.
6. In a small bowl, beat the egg white and water until frothy.
7. Brush the beaten mixture over the dough.
8. Sprinkle chopped almonds on top.
9. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until very lightly browned.
10. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
Makes about 2 1/2 dozen bars.
